prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 14503→15376→18368→17944→20247，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 5700 名；2025 年基准位次约 20247 名，较 2024 年进一步后移约 2300 名，下行压力明显；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021 年 66 人、2022 年 64 人、2023 年 74 人、2024 年 73 人、2025 年 79 人；2026 年计划 86 人，较 2025 年扩招约 8.9%，招生名额增加使竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学为 211、双一流高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年持续上升，2021 年第 65 名→2026 年第 52 名，学校综合实力与认可度稳步提升；2023 年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学校管理事件），但 2026 年声誉数据中无该校负面记录；抖音热度总排名第 71、评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；轻工技术与工程 A+、食品科学与工程 A+，均为全国顶尖水平；食品科学与工程、食品质量与安全等专业在重庆物理类招生，王牌学科对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热；江南大学在重庆物理类开设计算机、自动化、人工智能、机器人工程等热门专业，对高分考生吸引力强；重庆物理类考生 2025 年约 13.9 万，2026 年估算约 13.5 万，考生总数略有下降；省控线近年波动不大；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对西南考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在重庆招生占比约 2.5%（2025 年），非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年扩招约 8.9% 缓解竞争、学校排名稳步提升增强吸引力、王牌学科食品/轻工对考生有号召力、以及重庆物理类考生总数略降等因素，考虑学校排名上升和优势学科吸引力带来的竞争加剧效应，小幅修正后预测 2026 年最低位次约 21273 名，区间 20773–21773 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14503→15376→18368→17944→20247, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5700 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20247, further shifting back by about 2300 places compared to 2024, indicating clear downward pressure; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category was 66 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 79 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 86, an increase of about 8.9% compared to 2025, and the increase in enrollment places eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been steadily rising in recent years, from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was somewhat negative (involving school management incidents), but there are no negative records for the university in the 2026 reputation data; the overall ranking on Douyin popularity is 71st, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure is moderate; no obvious gaps in admission files have been observed; Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, and Food Science and Engineering is A+, both at the national top level; majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Quality and Safety are enrolled in the Physics Category in Chongqing, and the top disciplines have strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society; Jiangnan University offers popular majors like Computer Science, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, and Robotics Engineering in the Physics Category in Chongqing, which strongly attract high-scoring candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing was about 139,000 in 2025 and is estimated to be about 135,000 in 2026, with a slight decrease in total candidates; the provincial control line has fluctuated little in recent years; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Southwest China; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), not a major source region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 8.9% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the steadily rising university ranking enhancing appeal, the strong attraction of top disciplines like Food Science and Light Industry, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing, and taking into account the intensified competition caused by the rising university ranking and the appeal of advantageous disciplines, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 21273, with a range of 20773–21773.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 21273, with a range of 20773–21773. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (20773) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Automation; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range should consider Tier 2 majors such as Food Science and Engineering (A+ top discipline) and Mechanical Engineering as main choices; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (21773) can consider Tier 3 majors like Textile Engineering and Environmental Engineering as safety options. Although Food Science and Engineering is in Tier 2, its discipline evaluation is A+, offering extremely high cost-performance, and deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated: approximately 3295 → 3541 → 4014 → 3780 → 3349, showing an overall volatile trend. The 2026 plan is 15, a reduction of about 6.3% from 2025, with the continuous reduction in enrollment slots intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years to 52nd place, with steadily improving comprehensive strength. In 2023, reputation evaluations were somewhat negative, but in 2026 there are no negative records. Douyin popularity is average. No records of enrollment gaps or interruptions have been observed. Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, Food Science and Engineering is A+, but the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Ideological and Political Education, Social Work, Japanese) have low correlation with the university's flagship disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is socially recommended, and Teacher Education/Education is to be observed. The number of History Category examinees in Chongqing was about 73,000 in 2025, estimated at about 74,000 in 2026, roughly stable. The provincial control line has risen slightly in recent years. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, and the Yangtze River Delta region has some appeal to southwestern examinees. The university's enrollment in History Category in Chongqing is small (15–20 people), making ranking fluctuations relatively sensitive due to the small enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent two-year upward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 6.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the rising university ranking enhancing attractiveness, the basically stable total number of History Category examinees, and the relatively high social popularity of majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature, with a small reduction rate and stable examinee numbers, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3243, with a range of 2743–3743.
